themes.title: National priority policies spark constitutional debates
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right parties in Spain, Italy, and Germany are pushing 'national priority' policies, sparking constitutional and legal debates. These policies prioritize nationals in healthcare, housing, and social services, often clashing with regional governments and opposition parties over legality and inclusivity.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Proposes 'national priority' in healthcare, housing, and social aid, leading to clashes with PP and regional governments in Aragón, Extremadura, and Valencia.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Supports regional alliances with Vox-like policies, such as prioritizing Italians in public services, while facing criticism from opposition parties.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Advocates for policies favoring French nationals in social services, aligning with broader right-wing trends across Europe.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: Promotes national priority in welfare and immigration policies, often clashing with local governments over implementation.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Proposes stricter immigration controls and prioritization of British citizens in public services, echoing continental right-wing policies.

themes.title: Far-right parties surge in European polls
themes.blurb: Far-right parties across Europe are gaining significant traction in polls, challenging traditional conservative and centrist parties. This trend reflects growing voter dissatisfaction with immigration, economic policies, and EU governance, with parties like AfD, RN, and Vox leading the charge.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: Leads polls with 27% support, surpassing the Union (CDU/CSU) and capitalizing on voter dissatisfaction with immigration and economic policies.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Gains momentum in French polls, positioning itself as a viable alternative to Macron's centrist government ahead of the 2027 presidential election.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Maintains strong polling numbers, particularly in regional elections, while facing internal divisions over policy direction.

countries.name: 🇸🇪 Sverigedemokraterna
countries.note: Continues to rise in Swedish polls, influencing government policies on immigration and law enforcement.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Gains ground in regional elections, particularly in Andalusia and Aragón, by advocating for stricter immigration controls and national sovereignty.

themes.title: Trump’s policies dominate global right-wing coverage
themes.blurb: Donald Trump's domestic and foreign policies continue to shape right-wing discourse globally, with his administration's actions on Iran, immigration, and economic nationalism resonating across borders. Right-wing parties in Europe and beyond are adopting similar rhetoric and policy proposals.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump's policies on Iran, immigration, and economic nationalism dominate U.S. right-wing media, influencing global narratives.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Adopts Trump-like rhetoric on immigration and national sovereignty, gaining traction in UK polls and local elections.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Mirrors Trump's hardline stance on immigration and national security, aligning with his administration's policies in public statements.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Promotes Trump-style nationalism, particularly on immigration and EU skepticism, ahead of the 2027 French presidential election.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Supports Trump's foreign policy, particularly on Iran and NATO, while advocating for similar economic nationalist measures in Italy.

themes.title: Orbán’s resignation reshapes Hungarian politics
themes.blurb: Viktor Orbán's unexpected resignation as Hungarian Prime Minister and Fidesz leader has triggered a political earthquake, with opposition leader Péter Magyar poised to take power. This shift is reverberating across Central Europe, influencing right-wing parties in Poland and beyond.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Orbán's resignation and Fidesz's election defeat mark a historic shift, with Péter Magyar's Tisza Party taking power and promising anti-corruption reforms.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Monitors developments in Hungary closely, with PiS leaders expressing concerns about the implications for conservative governance in Poland.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: Views Orbán's resignation as a cautionary tale for right-wing parties, while maintaining ties with Fidesz remnants.

countries.name: 🇪🇺 EU Relations
countries.note: The EU responds to Orbán's resignation with cautious optimism, anticipating potential reforms in Hungary's rule-of-law and anti-corruption policies.

themes.title: Far-right rhetoric fuels political violence
themes.blurb: Far-right rhetoric and policies are increasingly linked to political violence, both in Europe and the U.S. Incidents of threats, protests turning violent, and assassination attempts are rising, with right-wing parties often accused of inciting or failing to condemn such actions.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Faces criticism for inflammatory rhetoric on immigration and LGBTQ+ rights, linked to rising political violence in Italy.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Accused of inciting violence through aggressive anti-immigration and anti-left rhetoric, particularly during protests and campaign events.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Criticized for extremist rhetoric among candidates, with some members sharing violent or discriminatory content online.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Trump's rhetoric is linked to multiple assassination attempts and rising political violence, with critics blaming his inflammatory language.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Faces accusations of fueling political violence through anti-immigration and anti-Islam rhetoric, particularly during protests.
